reason: The tweet mentions 'Wilayat Halab' (ISIS province of Aleppo) and uses ISIS terminology like 'Ghazwat al-Thar lil-Afifat' (Revenge Raid for the Chaste Women), referring to an ISIS propaganda video. It also includes the ISIS flag hashtag.
